postmark.Subject: Re: Refinance submission — Marcus Webb
postmark.TextBody:
Quick correction — the loan application form has an outdated number. Marcus Webb's actual loan request is $280,000, not the $95,000 shown on the form. We're refinancing to pull equity for renovations. Property value $650,000 stands.

Please use $280,000 for the underwriting.
